title: evolvulus alsinoides var. adscendens
intro: Evolvulus alsinoides var. adscendens, also known as 'slender dwarf blue-dust', is a variety of flowering plant native to tropical Asia, characterized by its small, delicate blue flowers and slender stems. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus alsinoides var. adscendens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit wound-healing properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
